description: Component for ingesting Twitter/X Ads data using dlt - returns DataFrames.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset that will hold the Twitter Ads data

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.description: Twitter Access Token. Use ${TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN} for env vars.

access_token_secret.label: Access Token Secret
access_token_secret.description: Twitter Access Token Secret. Use ${TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET} for env vars.

account_ids.label: Account Ids
account_ids.description: Comma-separated list of Twitter Ads Account IDs (e.g.,

resources.label: Resources
resources.description: Comma-separated list of resources to extract: accounts, campaigns, line_items, promoted_tweets, tweets, media, analytics

entity_type.label: Entity Type
entity_type.description: Analytics entity type: ACCOUNT, FUNDING_INSTRUMENT, CAMPAIGN, LINE_ITEM, or PROMOTED_TWEET

granularity.label: Granularity
granularity.description: Analytics granularity: HOUR, DAY, or TOTAL

metric_groups.label: Metric Groups
metric_groups.description: Comma-separated metric groups: ENGAGEMENT, BILLING, VIDEO, MOBILE_CONVERSION, WEB_CONVERSION, MEDIA, LIFE_TIME_VALUE_MOBILE_CONVERSION

include_sample_metadata.label: Include Sample Metadata
include_sample_metadata.description: Include sample data preview in metadata

destination_config.label: Destination Config
destination_config.description: Optional destination configuration as connection string or JSON. Required if destination is set.

persist_and_return.label: Persist And Return
persist_and_return.description: If True with destination set: persist to database AND return DataFrame. If False: only persist to database.

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on (e.g. [
